source: American Express India public summaries (approximate; verify with issuer)

cards.reward_rate: 3X Membership Rewards® points on overseas spends; elevated earn on travel and dining (see issuer T&Cs)
cards.lounge_access: Access to 1400+ lounges worldwide (program rules apply)
cards.key_benefits: Global lounge access, hotel/airline program credits, concierge; charge card with no preset spending limit (pay in full)

cards.card_name: American Express® Platinum ReserveSM Credit Card
cards.reward_rate: 11,000 bonus Membership Rewards® points in the first year (campaigns vary); ongoing MR on spends per issuer rules
cards.lounge_access: Complimentary domestic and international lounge access (select programs)
cards.best_for: Taj, SeleQtions and Vivanta hotel privileges
cards.key_benefits: Hotel dining/spa vouchers, accelerated rewards on travel and lifestyle spends

cards.card_name: American Express® Platinum Travel Credit Card
cards.reward_rate: Milestone travel vouchers and Membership Rewards® on spends (see issuer for current offers)
cards.lounge_access: 2 complimentary lounge visits per quarter at select airports
cards.key_benefits: Travel vouchers on spend milestones; MR redemption toward travel and more

cards.annual_fee: Rs. 4,500 plus applicable taxes (verify at application)
cards.reward_rate: Membership Rewards® on dining, travel and everyday spends per category rules
cards.lounge_access: Limited or add-on lounge benefits; confirm with issuer
cards.key_benefits: Gold-tier MR earn on dining and travel; charge card — settle balance in full

cards.card_name: American Express Membership Rewards® Credit Card
cards.annual_fee: Rs. 4,500 plus applicable taxes (verify at application)
cards.reward_rate: 1 Membership Rewards® point per Rs. 50 on most retail spends (exclusions apply)
cards.lounge_access: None or paid programs only — confirm with issuer
cards.best_for: Simple MR earn and redemption flexibility
cards.key_benefits: Straightforward MR program; suitable as an entry to Amex ecosystem

cards.annual_fee: Rs. 495 plus applicable taxes (renewal waiver on Rs. 40,000+ eligible spends in prior year)
cards.reward_rate: Accelerated MR on Amazon, Flipkart, Uber, Zomato, BookMyShow, EaseMyTrip and partners; 1 MR per Rs. 50 base earn on other retail (exclusions apply)
cards.key_benefits: Low fee; welcome benefit campaigns; fee waiver on meeting annual spend threshold
